scenarios.title: Informatica — Integration Job Failure Auto-Recovery
scenarios.subtitle: IICS on OCI · Failed jobs + transit files · TCS FAM team 4-6h manual · ZeroOps 18 min
scenarios.blastRadius: HIGH — All downstream systems affected: Oracle EBS, Salesforce, Pearlchain, Primavera, OAS — data delays cascade to all reporting
scenarios.reversibility: HIGH — Job restart and file move are non-destructive and fully reversible
scenarios.slaStatus: P1 SLA MET — resolved in 18 min
scenarios.whyHitl: Risk score 14 — pre-approved job restart patterns safe and reversible. TCS FAM team freed from manual recovery dependency.

steps.label: Informatica job failures detected via ELK/OEM
steps.summary: Detect failed Informatica jobs — alert correlation

events.msg: [Alert Correlator] ELK alert: 7 Informatica jobs in FAILED state
[Alert Correlator] OEM: 3 jobs unscheduled — automatic scheduling disabled on failure
[Alert Correlator] 24 files detected in transit directory — not moved to landing
[Alert Correlator] 65501787 raised — integration cascade risk: EBS, Salesforce, Pearlchain

steps.label: RCA: job failure root cause identified
steps.summary: Root cause: upstream data format change causing parse failure

events.msg: [RCA Engine] Analysing IICS execution logs — job error patterns
[RCA Engine] Root cause: upstream source sent unexpected null field — parse failure
[RCA Engine] Pattern matched to KB-CN-001 — confidence 91% — pre-approved fix available

steps.label: Outbound jobs: batch status reset
steps.summary: Reset batch status for failed outbound jobs

events.msg: [Remediation Agent] Resetting batch status for 4 outbound jobs
[Remediation Agent] Batch status reset complete — jobs ready for restart

steps.label: Inbound jobs: transit files moved to landing
steps.summary: Move 24 unprocessed files from transit to landing directory

events.msg: [Remediation Agent] Moving 24 unprocessed files from transit to landing directory
[Remediation Agent] Files moved successfully — inbound jobs retriggered
[Remediation Agent] Inbound processing started — 24 files queued

steps.label: All jobs restarted and scheduled — processing resumed
steps.summary: Validate all jobs running and data flowing downstream

events.msg: [Change Validator] All 7 failed jobs restarted — running successfully
[Change Validator] 3 unscheduled jobs rescheduled — scheduler re-enabled
[Change Validator] Downstream data flow confirmed: EBS, Salesforce, Pearlchain feeds active
[XURRENT] 65501787 resolved — MTTR 18 min (vs 4-6h manual)
[ZeroOps] KB-CN-001 updated — null field parse failure pattern confirmed

remediationPlan.act: Detect failed Informatica jobs via ELK/OEM alerts
RCA: upstream format change → parse failure → cascade risk
Reset batch status for outbound jobs
Move 24 transit files to landing — trigger inbound jobs
Restart all failed/unscheduled jobs — validate downstream

outcome.result: All 7 Informatica jobs restarted, 24 transit files processed, downstream systems unblocked — TCS FAM team manual dependency eliminated
outcome.agents: Alert Correlator, RCA Engine, Remediation Agent, Change Validator

scenarios.title: Oracle EBS OTC — Ship Confirmation Stuck · Revenue Unblocked
scenarios.subtitle: Shipping Execution (WSH) · MTL Interface pending · 3-4h → 28 min · Finance HiTL gate
scenarios.blastRadius: CRITICAL — Revenue recognition delayed · Finance and supply chain blocked · Period-end risk
scenarios.reversibility: MEDIUM — Concurrent request reprocessing safe; DB-level fix requires validation
scenarios.whyHitl: Risk score 42 — DB-level data fix requires DBA/finance sign-off before execution to protect revenue integrity.

steps.label: Stuck ship confirmations detected — OEM alert
steps.summary: Detect stuck WSH concurrent requests via OEM

events.msg: [Alert Correlator] OEM alert: 38 WSH concurrent requests stuck > 30 min
[Alert Correlator] Orders in 'Shipped/Awaiting Closure' — revenue recognition blocked
[Alert Correlator] Finance team impact: month-end revenue booking at risk

steps.label: RCA: inventory interface pending — root cause
steps.summary: Root cause: inventory interface transactions not clearing

events.msg: [RCA Engine] Reviewing WSH execution errors and concurrent request logs
[RCA Engine] Inventory interface: 156 pending transactions not processed
[RCA Engine] Root cause: MTL_TRANSACTIONS_INTERFACE records stuck — confidence 89%

steps.label: Auto-reprocessing 32 of 38 stuck requests
steps.summary: Reprocess eligible ship confirm concurrent requests

events.msg: [Remediation Agent] 32 of 38 stuck requests match pre-approved reprocessing pattern
[Remediation Agent] Reprocessing 32 ship confirm requests via WSHFSTRX concurrent
[Remediation Agent] 32 orders cleared — inventory interface transactions processed

steps.label: 6 orders require DB-level fix — sign-off requested
steps.summary: DBA/Finance approval for DB-level data fix on 6 orders

events.msg: [HiTL] 6 orders require MTL_TRANSACTIONS_INTERFACE direct fix — DBA approval needed
[HiTL] Fix summary sent to Finance lead and DBA — one-click approval pending

steps.label: DB fix applied — all 38 orders cleared
steps.summary: Apply approved DB fix — clear remaining 6 orders

events.msg: [Remediation Agent] Applying approved DB fix to 6 remaining orders
[Remediation Agent] All 38 ship confirmations completed successfully
[Remediation Agent] Revenue recognition unblocked — order closure proceeding

steps.label: Validate — revenue booking confirmed
steps.summary: Validate all orders closed and revenue recognised

events.msg: [Change Validator] All 38 orders in Closed status — WSH clear
[Change Validator] Revenue recognition confirmed — period-end target protected
[ZeroOps] 65514548 resolved — MTTR 28 min (vs 3-4h manual)

remediationPlan.act: Detect stuck WSH concurrent requests via OEM
DBA/Finance approval for DB fix on 6 complex orders
Apply approved DB fix — clear remaining 6 orders
Validate — all 38 orders closed, revenue recognised

outcome.result: All 38 stuck ship confirmations cleared — revenue recognition unblocked — period-end target protected
outcome.agents: Alert Correlator, RCA Engine, Remediation Agent, Change Validator

scenarios.title: Oracle Finance AR — Direct Debit Auth Failure · Collections Restored
scenarios.subtitle: Oracle AR · Bank mandate expiry · 31 customers · 1 week → 4 hrs
scenarios.blastRadius: HIGH — Collection delays 1-3 business days · DSO impact · Customer dissatisfaction
scenarios.reversibility: HIGH — Mandate fix and AR reversal are standard auditable operations
scenarios.slaStatus: P1 SLA MET — 4 hrs (vs 1 week manual)
scenarios.whyHitl: Risk score 22 — mandate validation and AR reversal are pre-approved patterns. Automated within safe boundaries.

steps.label: DD authorisation failure detected pre-execution
steps.summary: Detect DD auth failure — invoices not picked

events.msg: [Alert Correlator] DD authorisation run: 284 invoices not picked — bank mandate error
[Alert Correlator] Mandate validation failed — affected customers identified
[Alert Correlator] INC-CN-00135 raised — collection delay risk for current period

steps.label: RCA: bank mandate configuration error
steps.summary: Identify mandate error — affected customer accounts

events.msg: [RCA Engine] Analysing Oracle AR mandate configuration for affected accounts
[RCA Engine] Mandate error: direct debit authority expired for 31 customers
[RCA Engine] Root cause identified — confidence 82% — mandate renewal required

steps.label: AR receipts reversed — mandate fix applied
steps.summary: Reverse impacted receipts and fix mandate in backend

events.msg: [Remediation Agent] Reversing 284 impacted AR receipts — pre-approved reversal script
[Remediation Agent] AR reversals complete — invoices back to open status
[Remediation Agent] Bank mandate corrected in Oracle AR backend for 31 customers

steps.label: Accenture team notified — DD rerun scheduled
steps.summary: Notify Accenture and schedule DD rerun within SLA window

events.msg: [Remediation Agent] Accenture team notified — mandate fix confirmed, DD rerun eligible
[Remediation Agent] DD rerun scheduled for next available window — same week vs 1 week delay

steps.label: Validate — collection timeline restored
steps.summary: Confirm mandate fix and collection schedule restored

events.msg: [Change Validator] Mandate validation passed for all 31 affected customers
[Change Validator] Collection delay reduced from 1 week to same-period resolution

remediationPlan.act: Detect DD auth failure — invoices not picked
RCA: mandate error — 31 expired customer mandates
Reverse AR receipts + fix mandate in backend
Notify Accenture — schedule DD rerun same window
Validate mandate fix and collection timeline

outcome.result: 284 AR receipts reversed, 31 mandates corrected, DD rerun scheduled same period — collection delay prevented
outcome.agents: Alert Correlator, RCA Engine, Remediation Agent, Change Validator
